review_title: Efficient and user-friendly SEO rank tracking tool that gets the job done
description: Overall, Mangools has been a great tool for our SEO needs, especially when it comes to rank tracking and keyword research. It's easy to use, affordable and provides the essential tools needed to manage and monitor SEO performance. For those looking for a solid SEO tool that doesn't require a steep learning curve, Mangools is a fantastic choice.
author: Philipp S.
pros: Mangools provides a user-friendly platform that makes tracking rankings simple and efficient. The SERPWatcher Rank Tracker tool is particularly useful for monitoring keyword positions over time, which has been invaluable in keeping track of our SEO efforts. The interface is intuitive and the visual reports make it easy to analyse trends and share results with our team.
cons: While it covers the basics well, there may be fewer options for in-depth analysis and competitive insights. This is somewhat mitigated once you start using the keyword research, SERP analysis, backlink checker and site explorer.

review_title: Best in terms of UX and Price
description: Depending on the plan, there’s a limit on tracked keywords. The upper limit is 1,500—you can buy more, but it quickly gets expensive. Other tools have similar restrictions, but I still wish I could track a lot more.
author: Marc D.
pros: I’ve been using Mangools for over 10 years across my startups and smaller projects. The UI is clear, intuitive, and easy to use, covering everything from finding relevant keywords to tracking their progress. Compared to more advanced tools, it’s also very affordable.
cons: Depending on the Tiers there is a limit on tracked keywords. The upper limit is 1.5k, you can buy more, but then it gets expensive. This is similar in other tools as well. Still i wish i could track much more.

description: Absolute crap. There is no one here to help I cannot login in anywhere. I cannot do my research I cannot access even a free trial bec they say I have done too much when I have just paid for 1 month. This is beyond words.
author: celine H.
pros: I paid for a monthly subscription and this entity assumed that I wanted to use a particular email address. I purchased the first month and tried to change my email account. Now I cannot get into ANYTHING. There is no online service to help - it is not a 24 hour service which is crap for this type of business. I joined thru an affiliate link for a course I am doing. The service is non-existent. I upgraded to the paid version so I could do research NOW. not when they felt like responding to my requests for help. The service is appalling.
cons: I don't know as I cannot use it bec you have locked me out and said that I am on a trial when I am not. This is so hard to get anywhere. You cannot login in anywhere The site assumes things and overrides what you want to do so how can someone possibly use this product when they make it so difficult.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: All you need for keyword research
description: I've been a customer for many years, very happy with keywordfinder and related tools. It has the right metrics, not too few, not too many. Super easy to use. Pricing is fair.
author: Jelle A.
pros: It's a very easy tool to use, not to many metrics, just the basics.
cons: Keyword suggestions could be improved in the keyword finder tool. It does not always show higher volume related keywords.

review_title: Mangools- Keyword research tool for paid advertising
description: I am digital marketing consultant specialising in paid advertising and my main interest is in the keyword research tool, I am happy with the use so far and the data being provided in their keyword search tool is very accurate allowing me to do proper planning and strategising.
author: Pavlos K.
pros: - Easy to use and interface that helps you navigate around their functions. - Cross-checking Google's keyword tool and Mangools, the discrepancies are very small which is extremely helpful to capture keyword volume of search and CPC.
cons: - Daily limit of keyword searches. - While it has many functions, if you are interested mainly in one of the functions you can't buy (or at least I could not find a way to buy) the maximum of the one function of interest. Someone has to buy the whole package, which might be a budget overkill
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Comprehensive Review of Mangools SEO Tool: Pros and Cons
description: Mangools is a great choice for users seeking accurate reports and budget-friendly pricing. However, it may not be the best option for users requiring advanced technical SEO features and reliable backlink tracking.
author: Manjot S.
pros: Pros: The SEO reports are highly accurate, making it easy to analyze website performance. Pricing is affordable and provides good value for money. The customer service team is very cooperative and flexible, ensuring a smooth user experience. Overall service quality is excellent.
cons: The tool lacks coverage of some critical technical aspects of site optimization. Backlink updates are limited; despite having 1,000 backlinks, only 6 updates were shown. The SEO extension occasionally has issues, affecting usability. Rank tracking has not functioned properly, even after consistent usage for the last seven months.

description: I have been using mangools for many years now and the tool has hardly ever disappointed me. The price-performance ratio is simply unbeatable and I would particularly like to emphasize the easily accessible, personal support, which is rarely available in this form elsewhere. Thanks to its intuitive interface, mangools will continue to be our tool of choice next year, especially for keyword research and monitoring our keywords. And I'm excited to see which functions will be added in the future. Thank you for the great support over the last few years!
author: Ramon W.
pros: Its intuitive user interface and very good price-performance ratio
cons: Occasionally there is a software bug here and there, but these are usually fixed quickly, which is not least due to the good availability of the support team.

description: Fast and reliable support. Quick to give answers & solutions.
author: Tomas E.
pros: Excellent support; fast solutions & practically always available. UX also really good.
cons: Haven't found any reasons yet. A connection to Looker studio would be awesome.

author: Gilad K.
pros: It is very useful. we use it for over 5 years now.
cons: If they can add keyword clustering, it will be even more awesome!

description: Terrific tool, I recomend it for the balance price/value
author: Antonio D.
pros: Easy to use, to learn and very helpful. The differents screen are quick to find and the tools are intuitive.
cons: Some days the dates last to be updated. I had to wait untill midday.

review_title: Best value for money SEO tool on the marker
description: Great, the tool has an amazing user interface, quick to navigate and very intuitive.
author: Norm M.
pros: Best value for money SEO tool on the market, we use it every day.
cons: Not as many features as competitors but significantly cheaper

review_title: Thanks to my customer agent care [sensitive content hidden]
description: Every thing is excellent. specially the customer care
author: Mahmoud B.
pros: Keyword Finder i use it all the time to find new keyword and track my ranks
cons: Customer Care, every time i need some thing or i hade an issue thel help me

description: I use Mangools for local research, when I want to see which keywords are being used in specific cities or regions rather than just across the whole country. I use Semrush as my main SEO tool, but I find that Mangools complements it really well as Semrush doesn't differentiate between different areas while Mangools does. The keyword database is smaller than Semrush, which is the only downside.
author: Ruti D.
pros: Excellent for keyword research for local SEO
cons: The keyword database is somewhat limited.

description: Regular monitoring of organic rankings evaluating the effectiveness of organic search terms. The main perk of using Mangools Tool is the ability to get alerts whenever a keyword decreases in organic searches.
author: Ifeanyi K.
pros: Mangools tools are cool, especially Kwfinder is undoubtedly one of the top keyword research tools available. It is my first choice when beginning any project I'm working on because it works incredibly well for long-tail keywords that other tools don't show or don't provide detail on. a really useful tool. Additionally, the support staff has always been quite polite and helpful, so if there is ever a problem, they will act fast to fix it.
cons: I dislike that I can't use Mangools Rank Tracking Tool to track both my own tracking domain and the rankings of my organic competitors. To accomplish this, I must set up a different tracking system. Additionally, I must extract whole keywords for each track separately because I cannot do so in a single report.

description: The overall experience with mangools is extremely positive, it being a wonderful tool for SEO analysis and strategy, provided that you are aware of its limits and your business does not require more specific features. It does not do all but what it does it does well.
author: Gaia B.
pros: Mangools offers one of the best chrome extensions for on-page SEO analysis. It is perfect for rapid, on-the-go analysis of a prospect's website during get-to-know calls and it provides lots of insights such as HTML lags, word numbers, structured data, headings, keywords, and outbound links. It also provides an intuitive overview of website ranking
cons: Some data is hidden behind a paywall and although it is an understandable marketing strategy, it's annoying for the user and takes away from the overall experience. Some of the estimates made on traffic and keyword value seem to be off if compared to data from more authoritative sources and better-known sofware

review_title: Best SEO Keyword Planner I have used just buy Chrome Extension
description: When I was using different tools for SEO there's something I was missing and in Kwfinder make it easy to get my job done. My boss always need good results but it's very difficult to get results. So now our website ranking better than before with some easy tools like Mangools Kwfinder and LinkMiner
author: Sumanta B.
pros: Mangools Kwfinder gives me an idea for top search keywords on Google. It's automatically appear the question which is ranking on Google. And I love to use Chrome Extension, Because in one click it shows everything.
cons: I'm getting confuse some time to login to different domain like, Kwfinder, SERPChecker, LinkMiner.

description: It is one of the most useful tools for my work, It is very easy to use and offers accurate information.
author: Fernando O.
pros: It is a tool that cannot be missed when making a keyword research, Comparing the results and the data obtained, it is one of the most accurate tools.
cons: So far, none have been detected, personally it is a tool that performs its function extraordinarily.

description: Planning a keyword strategy is so easy now with KWFinder and the other tools in the Mangools stack like SERPChecker.
author: Nik D.
pros: KWFinder is key to any SEO's digital toolbelt. When creating your keyword strategy, you can punch in all keywords you want to rank for, see the competition, and see all related keywords all in a single page. On top of that, they assign difficulty scores for each keyword, so you will have a sense for how difficult it will be for your site to rank for that keyword. You can also filter by region, language, search volume, PPC competition, average CPC, certain keywords, number of words (if you want to go longtail or not), keyword difficulty, and even keywords to exclude. Lastly, the price is unbeatable if you pay yearly.
cons: Their LinkMiner isn't quite as accurate as, say aHrefs in picking up backlinks on the sites that I checked. I understand that it's new, and it will be something I'm sure they'll work hard to tweak in the near future.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Anselme M.
pros: Mangools is the best solution to SEO your website. With its basic offer it is adorable and less confusing than the giants like ahrefs and semrush
cons: The backlinks provided by the software are sometimes difficult for natural referencing

review_title: Good SEO Suite For Small Business
description: Good SEO suite for content planning, keyword research, market intelligence.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Excellent value relative to other SEO suites. Limits (e.g. number of searches, size of lists) are way more than adequate for a reasonably sized brand.
cons: Hard to say - we are not power users. Maybe some of the "what geography" are these results showing info could be better highlighted?

description: Mangools is a really a software that has a lot of experience and really helps companies. It is not bad
author: Assimi D.
pros: Mangools is a software that provide several information such as keywords and others and it is also a good solution for the reference of web sites
cons: Some mangools data are paid and We also have the difficulty of mangools backlinks

author: Jean S.
pros: Mangools is very beneficial if you want to do the SEO of your website yourself. It is a seo suite of 5 very powerfull tools for SEO and moreover mangools is very affordable
cons: The disadvantage is that it is only for beginners and its search base is limited to Google

description: Fantastic
author: Harouna T.
pros: Mangools is good for keyword research. It is easy to use and its dashboard is also easy to navigate
cons: The search level of mangools keywords should be increased. It also does not have a team in which a beginner can hire

author: Hermann O.
pros: Langools is a suite of 5 very affordable seo tools. The software is ideal for bloggers and small businesses
cons: The software is not suitable for experts and limited data

description: Great experience. The tools in the Mangools suite make the life of an SEO much easier!
author: Michiel B.
pros: The Mangools tools are so simple to use. Very intuitive and great UI. I use KWFinder the most often, but also the other tools in this suite are invaluable, like rank tracking and looking up competitor backlinks.
cons: The thing that I miss the most is the ability to automatically have all the Keyword Difficulties calculated when doing keyword research. I understand the logic behind the way it is structured right now, but if these could be calculated on the fly automatically that would save a ton of time when doing keyword research.
